narrative_summary: - User invoked the `dagster-expert` skill to configure automation for a `customer_summary` asset
- Skill loaded reference files in sequence: `choosing-automation.md`, declarative automation `INDEX.md`, `customization.md`, `operators.md`, and `operands.md`
- Determined Declarative Automation was the right approach (asset-centric, dependency-aware conditions)
- Located the project file at `/private/var/folders/.../acme_co_dataeng/src/acme_co_dataeng/defs/customer_summary.py` which had three deps: `customer_events`, `sales_data`, `zip_codes`
1. `eager().ignore(zip_codes)` — triggers when `customer_events` or `sales_data` update, excluding `zip_codes` from all eager checks
2. `any_deps_match(newly_updated().since(cron_tick_passed("0 0 1 * *"))).allow(zip_codes)` — requires `zip_codes` has been materialized at least once since the start of the current month
- Combined both conditions with `&` and applied as `automation_condition` on the `customer_summary` asset
